scripts.build: node scripts/write-mobile-runtime-config.mjs && node ./node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc -b tsconfig.json && npm run build --workspace @adam-connect/mobile
scripts.typecheck: node scripts/write-mobile-runtime-config.mjs && node ./node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc -b tsconfig.json --pretty false && npm run typecheck --workspace @adam-connect/mobile
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @adam-connect/mobile && npm run lint --workspace @adam-connect/desktop-extension && npm run lint --workspace @adam-connect/gateway && npm run lint --workspace @adam-connect/desktop-shell
